title: Delivery and Shipping Terms
intro: We are committed to delivering your order quickly, safely, and conveniently. Below are the main delivery terms.

timeframes.title: 1. Delivery Timeframes
timeframes.bullet1: Delivery time depends on the type of order, delivery location, and shipping method.
timeframes.bullet2: Usually, orders are delivered within 3-7 business days.
timeframes.bullet3: In case of potential delays, our team will contact you.

options.title: 2. Delivery Options
options.intro: We offer the following delivery options:
options.bullet1: Standard delivery – carried out through our partner courier services.

delays.title: 4. Possible Delays
delays.intro: Despite our efforts, in some cases, delivery may be delayed due to:
delays.outro: We will inform you of any possible delays while ensuring transparent communication.
